task.name: Dependency Audit Task
task.objective: Scan project dependencies for security vulnerabilities, outdated versions, and license conflicts

critical.mandate: Check for known CVEs in dependencies

step.title: Identify Dependency Files
step.action: Look for: package.json, requirements.txt, pom.xml, pubspec.yaml, go.mod, Gemfile, Cargo.toml

step.title: Vulnerability Check
step.action: Identify dependencies with known CVEs or security advisories
Check for deprecated or abandoned packages

step.title: Version Analysis
step.action: Flag significantly outdated dependencies (major versions behind)
Identify dependencies with no recent releases or maintenance

step.title: License Check
step.action: Identify license types for all dependencies
Flag potential license conflicts or copyleft concerns

step.title: Report
step.template-output: Generate dependency audit report with risk levels (critical, high, medium, low), prioritized by exploitability and impact. Include: vulnerability findings with CVE IDs, outdated package list, license conflict summary, and remediation recommendations.

output.format: Markdown dependency audit report with risk levels
